description: Synthetic lending policy for unsecured personal consumer loans — prototype use only

policies.clause: Applications assigned a High risk tier must be escalated to manual underwriting for full review before any approval decision is made.
Applications with a debt-to-income ratio exceeding 43% require mandatory escalation to underwriting regardless of other scoring factors.
Applications with a credit score below 580 are classified as subprime and must be reviewed by a senior underwriter before proceeding.
Applications with two or more delinquencies in the past 24 months require escalation and documentation of the applicant's repayment history.
Borderline applications — those falling within the defined margin around escalation thresholds — must receive a structured policy-aligned review before a final triage recommendation is issued.
